Tell me a short story about a robot.
Once there was a small robot who loved to help people in a busy workshop. Every day it carried tools, fixed little parts, and made everyone smile.
Tell me a story about a bird.
There was a bright blue bird who sang at sunrise every morning. One day it learned to fly farther than ever before and found a new home near the sea.
Tell me a story about a winter day.
On a winter day, a child built a snow fort with a friend. They laughed, drank warm cocoa, and watched the snow fall quietly outside.
Tell me a story about a bicycle.
A red bicycle waited in the garage until a boy rode it to the park. The wheels spun fast, the bell rang, and the ride felt like freedom.
Tell me a story about a lost puppy.
A lost puppy wandered through the neighborhood until a kind girl knelt down and held out her hand. The puppy wagged its tail and followed her home.
Tell me a story about a brave girl.
A brave girl crossed a noisy bridge to deliver medicine to her grandmother. Even though she was scared, she kept going and finished the job.
Tell me a story about a rainy afternoon.
On a rainy afternoon, two friends stayed inside and built a cardboard castle. They listened to the rain and pretended they were on a grand adventure.
Tell me a story about a clever fox.
A clever fox noticed the farmers had hidden the last apples high in a tree. It found a way to stack logs, reach the branch, and enjoy a sweet snack.
